statement: Card-specific movement rules — Each card type moves differently and that movement is part of its meaning. The shared system must allow per-card movement rules rather than forcing identical behavior. — Phase cards move horizontally across the Kanban stage. Action cards move vertically inside a phase and horizontally between phases. Task cards move inside actions, between actions, and across dates in Timeline. Movement rules are card-type configuration, not shell logic.
ux_impact: Movement matches the mental model of each object.
